channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月25日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 RubyLLM: A Ruby framework for all major AI providers #2 John Carmack on the mistakes around Quake that ruined id software #3 We’re making Bunny DNS free #4 Show HN: Nub – A Bun-like all-in-one toolkit for Node.js #5 Running Windows Games on a Hobby OS with Wine #6 Krea 2: SOTA open-weights 12B image model #7 A Practical Guide to SSH Tunnels: Local and Remote Port Forwarding #8 Founding a company in Germany: €9600, 152 days and I still can't send an invoice #9 Quebec town recognizes trees as living beings with rights #10 I taught a bucket to speak Git

item.title: 2026年6月25日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom #2 Qualcomm to Acquire Modular #3 RubyLLM: A Ruby framework for all major AI providers #4 Elastic lays off 7% of employees #5 We’re making Bunny DNS free #6 PR spam today looks like email spam in the early 2000s #7 Computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash #8 PostgreSQL Is Enough #9 The Xteink X4 E-Ink Reader #10 Robotics Teams Are Rebuilding the Data Stack from Scratch
